title: Advice & Support | Simon Lightwood MP
meta_description: Simon Lightwood MP is the Labour and Co-operative Member of Parliament for Wakefield and Rothwell
headings: h2: No events at the moment
h3: You can find a wide range of useful and emergency contacts here ​ ​ ​
text_excerpt: --> Advice & Support | Simon Lightwood MP top of page Home About Advice & Support Visit Parliament Gallery Transport Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Advice & Support. Ask for help How can we help? Help with Council issues Surgery Appointments Complete our contact form Useful contacts Ask for help Our casework service is supported by two dedicated members of staff. We’re a small team but we work really hard to support as many people as possible, as quickly as possible. Because we receive so many requests for assistance we sometimes have to prioritise urgent cases first. We'll also prioritise personal emails over any automated campaign emails. Before you get in touch it's important that you know there is a strict Parliamentary protocol which prevents me from intervening on behalf of another MP’s constituents. So please double check that you live in the Wakefield and Rothwell constituency and that I am your Member of Parliament. You can do this by entering your postcode here . How we can help? ​ ​ We can help constituents with the following issues: ​ Tax problems involving the HM Revenue and Customs Department Welfare issues dealt with by the Department for Work and Pensions such as benefits, tax credits and state pensions Issues handled by the Home Office such as immigration and passports Issues relating to the Department of Health and Social Care such as concerns about hospitals or access to treatment Any issues arising from any other government departments Issues with utility companies Consumer issues ​ We can support constituents by: ​ Writing to the Minister with responsibility for the department concerned Asking an official for an explanation of why a decision has been made Asking for a decision to be reviewed ​ So that we can help, you will need to: ​ Provide your full name Provide your full postal address including post code Provide a contact telephone number and an email address if you have one Provide your national insurance number Include scans / copies of any supporting documents (please do not enclose originals) ​ We will contact you to let you know what action Simon has taken and to advise you of the outcome of our enquiries. If you continue to be unhappy with a decision or issues raised, you may be able to refer your case to the relevant Ombudsman. We will include information on any further action you can take when we contact you. ​ ​ ​ ​​ ​ Help with council issues ​ ​ ​ Issues relating to services provided by the Local Authority, Wakefield Council and Leeds City Council need to be raised with the relevant council department or your local councillor in the first instance. ​ This includes: ​ Housing and council tax Anti-social behaviour Highways and roads Planning Bins and littering School placements Adults' and children’s social services ​ You can find out who your councillor is by entering your postcode here. ​ ​ Surgery Appointments ​ ​ It's often not necessary to wait for a surgery appointment to receive assistance from us. We have a dedicated team of expert caseworkers who support Simon and are ready to help you with a wide range of issues. Whether you need advice, support with a specific problem, or guidance on navigating government services, our caseworkers are here to provide timely and effective assistance. Don't hesitate to reach out to us for help—we're committed to serving you as efficiently as possible. ​ ​ No events at the moment About you Before you begin you should check that Simon is your MP as there is a strict parliamentary protocol which means that MPs can only assist members of their own constituencies. Even if an issue arose elsewhere you should still contact your home MP. You can check who your MP is by entering your postcode on the UK Parliament website . We also have a more comprehensive Casework Form which guides you through everything we may need to assist you and allows you to upload supporting documents. Click here to complete that form i
